_note: TabPFN v2 (Prior Labs). CONTRACT DEVIATIONS from the TabFM engine contract, see tools/export_tabpfn feasibility report: (1) train_size is NOT a scalar input — the train/test split is len(y); the engine must feed y as the TRAIN-LABEL PREFIX [1,N] (not full [1,T]). Output logits[1,T,C] carries predictions on rows >= N (rows < N are zero pad; engine reads logits[:, train_size:] as today). (2) cat_mask and d are NOT graph inputs — categoricals must be ordinal-encoded to floats upstream; TabPFN auto-detects/pads features internally. (3) Do NOT z-score features on the C++ side: TabPFN standard-scales internally (feed raw). (4) Classification C=max_classes(10); REGRESSION C=num_buckets(5000) bar-distribution logits, NOT a single value — a point estimate needs the bar-distribution borders (not shipped here). (5) Multiclass target densification is disabled at export; correct when train labels are the dense set 0..C-1. (6) HF ships .ckpt (PyTorch), not safetensors — WS-D must convert ckpt -> safetensors keyed by the tensor_map before injection. tensor_contract input names x,y match the exported graph; train_size/cat_mask/d are intentionally absent.
